positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a cosmic forest scene. Towering, bioluminescent trees with intricate, geometric bark radiate soft blue and emerald green light. Floating, ethereal geometric shapes drift through the upper canopy. The foreground features crystalline fauna and glowing flora, creating a powerful sense of mystery and wonder. Highly detailed, clean silhouettes, strong contrast between deep space black and vibrant glowing elements. Composition should be central and balanced, perfect for a wearable art print. Style: Art Deco meets cosmic vaporwave, vector art aesthetic, high-contrast graphic novel style, deep focus, vibrant color palette. Golden ratio composition.
negative: blurry, messy, deformed, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low quality, text, watermark, logo, signature, copyrighted characters, cartoon, photorealistic
